violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoops in coffee powders with handles in product. -Ice scoop laying in ice with handle in product.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface used with potentially hazardous food was not cleaned every four hours while in use or as frequently as required. -Utensils, pitchers, and blender are being rinsed throughout day with full wash, rinse and sanitize at end of day.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — ---Sanitizer cloths are being kept in sani sink between uses.--Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Sani Sink found at ~150ppm Quat solution. *Facility has been only using 1 tab, added 2 more while on-site which corrected solution to 200ppm Quat.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Single use cups and lids stored on counter top next to blender.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Single use items on floor at dry storage in office. -Dish soap and hand soap stored with single use items in dry storage.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -No caulking at gap around mop sink at wall/sink juncture. -Insufficient caulking at fresh cement of kitchen floor drain. -No drain cover in place at floor drain in kitchen. *Recommended a drain cover that sits below floor level at drain opening. *OSB around mop sink was painted since initial inspection-monitor to verify surface is sufficiently non-absorbent and can be easily washed. *New cement at kitchen floor drain had been sealed a 3rd time after initial inspection-verify the cement remains non-absorbent.
